mainEntity.name: How long does it take to see results from voice assistant optimization?

acceptedAnswer.text: Some improvements can be made in a few hours, especially adding FAQ schema or rewriting short answer blocks. Broader gains usually take weeks or months because assistants need time to recrawl pages and reflect the changes in search behavior.
acceptedAnswer.description: Small fixes can help quickly, but meaningful visibility usually takes weeks to months. Faster wins come from FAQ schema, clearer answers, and pages already getting search impressions.
